meta.purpose: Progress log for Firebase/Firestore security, emulator-test preparation and database scalability guardrails.

entries.goal: Add static Firebase/Firestore security audit and execute it from the existing quality gate.
checksAdded: Verify server-only economy collections have rule blocks
Verify server-only economy collections deny client create/update/delete
Detect temporary MVP bridge rules and report them as warnings
Verify final catch-all deny rule exists
Invoke Firebase security audit from agent:quality-gate
nextSteps: If the audit fails, document exact collection/rule issue before changing firestore.rules
Future sub-step: emulator tests, not in this initial static audit PR
